db:abstract.db:para: Demonstrates how to do instanced rendering in Qt Quick 3D.

db:article.db:programlisting:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16) project(instancing LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON)
if(NOT DEFINED INSTALL_EXAMPLESDIR) set(INSTALL_EXAMPLESDIR "examples") endif()
set(INSTALL_EXAMPLEDIR "${INSTALL_EXAMPLESDIR}/quick3d/instancing")
find_package(Qt6 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Core Gui Quick Quick3D)
qt_add_executable(instancing main.cpp )
set_target_properties(instancing PROPERTIES WIN32_EXECUTABLE TRUE MACOSX_BUNDLE TRUE )
target_link_libraries(instancing PUBLIC Qt::Core Qt::Gui Qt::Quick Qt::Quick3D )
qt_add_qml_module(instancing URI Example VERSION 1.0 QML_FILES Asteroid.qml SimpleSpaceship.qml main.qml RESOURCES meshes/asteroid.mesh meshes/ship.mesh NO_RESOURCE_TARGET_PATH )
install(TARGETS instancing RUNTIME DESTINATION "${INSTALL_EXAMPLEDIR}" BUNDLE DESTINATION "${INSTALL_EXAMPLEDIR}" LIBRARY DESTINATION "${INSTALL_EXAMPLEDIR}" )
